# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-socket-ci
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-socket-ci
spec:
  restartPolicy: Never
  serviceAccountName: ci-builder
  automountServiceAccountToken: true
  volumes:
    - name: docker-sock
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
        type: Socket
    - name: docker-lib
      hostPath:
        path: /var/lib/docker
        type: DirectoryOrCreate
  containers:
    - name: ci
      image: your-registry/your-ci-image:latest
      imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
      securityContext:
        privileged: true
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
        capabilities:
          add:
            - SYS_ADMIN
            - NET_ADMIN
            - DAC_READ_SEARCH
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-sock
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
        - name: docker-lib
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: unix:///var/run/docker.sock
